zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Melville - Second Lord of Raith於1384年出生在英國蘇格蘭費伏時，他的父親John Melville - First Lord of Raith37歲，母親Margaret Elinor Stewart9歲。他和Marjory Scott至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1463年8月之前在蘇格蘭費伏。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Melville - Second Lord of Raith于1384年出生在英国苏格兰費伏时，他的父亲John Melville - First Lord of Raith37岁，母亲Margaret Elinor Stewart9岁。他和Marjory Scott至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1463年8月之前在苏格兰費伏。

nameMeanings.name: Melville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of the various places in Normandy called Malleville, from Latin mala ‘bad’ + ville ‘settlement’.
Irish (mainly Ulster): English surname adopted by bearers of Gaelic Ó Maoilmhichíl ‘descendant of Maoilmhichil’, a personal name meaning ‘devotee of (Saint) Michael’.

History: The American novelist Herman Melville (1819–91) was a descendantof the Scottish Melvilles. His maternal grandfather was the revolutionary war general Peter Gansevoort (born 1749 in Albany, NY). His paternal grandfather was Maj. Thomas Melville of Boston. Irish bearers of the name claim descent from Maol Mhichíl, a chief of Síol Muireadhaigh (County Roscommon) in the 9th century.

variants.name: Melvin
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): variant of Melville with alternation of final -l and -n.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Maoil Mhín ‘descendant of the devotee of Maoilmhín’, a personal name meaning ‘gentle chieftain’.

variants.name: Mellin
meanings: German: habitational name from any of various places so called.

variants.name: Mulvihill
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Maoil Mhichíl ‘descendant of the devotee of (Saint) Michael’. The Anglicized form was sometimes abbreviated into Melville .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Melville - Second Lord of Raith was born in 1384, in Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, John Melville - First Lord of Raith, was 37 and his mother, Margaret Elinor Stewart, was 9. He had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Marjory Scott. He died before August 1463, in Fife, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Melville - Second Lord of Raith est né en 1384, à Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Melville - First Lord of Raith, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Margaret Elinor Stewart, avait 9 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Marjory Scott. Il est décédé avant août 1463, à Fife, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Melville - Second Lord of Raith 1384 in Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Melville - First Lord of Raith 37 und seine Mutter Margaret Elinor Stewart 9. Er hatte mit Marjory Scott mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor August 1463 in Fife, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Melville - Second Lord of Raith è nato il nel 1384 nel Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Melville - First Lord of Raith, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Elinor Stewart, aveva 9 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Marjory Scott. Morì prima del agosto 1463, nel Fife, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Melville - Second Lord of Raithが1384年にイギリススコットランドフィフで生まれた時，父John Melville - First Lord of Raithは37歳，母Margaret Elinor Stewartは9歳であった。彼はMarjory Scottとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1463年8月以前にスコットランドフィフで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Melville - Second Lord of Raith(이)가 1384년 영국 스코틀랜드 피프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Melville - First Lord of Raith(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Elinor Stewart(은)는 9세였다. 그는 Marjory Scott(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1463년 8월 이전 스컷랜드 피프에서 사망했다.
